title: Reference-Aligned Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering over Heterogeneous Proprietary Documents
specific_focus: QA for vehicle crash collision tests

key_components: Data generation pipeline for heterogeneous documents
methodology.goal: Fully local system for data privacy and independence

challenges_addressed: Integration of heterogeneous and unstructured documents
Limited inherent knowledge in low-resource domains
Limited research on retrieval ranking and document tracing
Inadequate evaluation methods for RAG systems

figures.description: RAG system workflow showing retrieval, re-ranking, answer generation, and reference alignment
